data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a teaching assistant monitoring remote chat, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the functionality of the teaching assistant monitoring remote chat is implemented or functioning as required. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to validate this specific requirement leads to a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of teaching assistant monitoring remote chat.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
